working_on: ADR 0047 — structural-reference parser tool + adversarial-triage workflow + ephemeral-output decisions; engine/tools/parse_structural_reference.py scaffold with HTML input adapter for SEP; SEP test fixtures cached locally; pytest suite mirroring test_validate.py shape. Phase 5 epistemology build-readiness gate slips to S-0041 (S-0040 took the wing-filter fix).
outcome_summary: S-0039 landed engine ADR 0047 + structural-reference parser tool. ADR 0047 settles four operational decisions for consuming the ADR 0046 reference class: standing engine tool decoupled from phases; document-agnostic with per-document-type configs (one parser, multiple input adapters sharing structural-detector layer); ephemeral signal-not-truth output (no engine/parser_findings/, no cross-source corroboration, reversibility named); adversarial triage defaulting to rejection (parametric-knowledge boundary, duplicate-node, out-of-scope per ADR 0001). Implementation: engine/tools/parse_structural_reference.py (~600 lines mirroring validate.py's contract-block + pure-detector + argparse-dispatch shape) with InputAdapter interface, HTMLInputAdapter for SEP/IEP-shaped HTML (entry boundary via title+H1; cross-references via SEP sibling-relative ../<slug>/, SEP absolute, IEP absolute patterns; section path from first H2; per-config SEP/IEP title-suffix stripping), pure-function detectors (detect_title, detect_entry_id, detect_cross_references, detect_section_path, detect_word_count, compute_extraction_confidence), FocusingBriefEmitter producing per-entry JSON, CLI via argparse. engine/tools/test_parse_structural_reference.py adds 81 tests covering every detector branch, HTMLInputAdapter happy/edge paths, FocusingBrief schema, integration against six cached SEP fixtures (epistemology, consciousness, ethics-virtue, scientific-method, kant, qualia-knowledge), and CLI via subprocess. beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0 added to engine/tools/requirements.txt. Test fixtures acquired under SEP's crawl-for-indexing permission per content-strategy.md Tier 4; parser-internal; ADR 0011 unchanged. engine/adr/README.md index updated; header count corrected from stale '11 ADRs total' (table already had 12) to '13 ADRs total — all Accepted'. ADR count: 46 → 47 (12 → 13 engine + 34 product). Validator clean (16 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns). 331 tests pass (was 250 at S-0037 close; +81 new). Cold-context review pass per ADR 0038: clean — both new Python files match contract; no premise drift detected. Concurrent-session note: S-0040 (MemPalace wing-filter fix) was eager-claimed concurrently in worktree eloquent-knuth-423df2 and committed 1a41277 to main during S-0039; rebased cleanly (only my feat commit needed rebasing; eager-claim commit was already on the shared lineage). S-0040 owns the live current.json and register_state.json; S-0039 archive written directly rather than via the customary `mv current.json` to avoid stomping S-0040's in-flight slot. Phase 5 epistemology gate slips to S-0041.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'deferred' marker appears in the S-0039 feat commit message context 'Triage prompt template and PDF input adapter deferred per ADR 0047.' Both deferrals are named and justified inside ADR 0047 itself with explicit lands-at-first-real-use criteria (the triage prompt template needs real focusing-brief output to author against; the PDF input adapter needs an acquired PDF source). They are deliberate ADR-tracked deferrals, not unaddressed loose ends; no follow-up disposition is required.

concurrent_sessions.working_on_at_S-0039_close: MemPalace wing-filter fix (deferred from S-0038 in violation of CLAUDE.md fix-in-context posture)
concurrent_sessions.note: S-0040 owns the live engine/session/current.json and engine/session/register_state.json at S-0039 close. S-0039's session-state files live only in the eager-claim commit 542a171 in git history; the archive at this path is the canonical S-0039 record.
